derive.title: Request History idle
derive.detail: This screen is for inspecting the save/apply chain of the currently mounted item. Mount an item in Collections Explorer first, then return here.

derive.title: Request History waiting
derive.detail: A mounted item is present, but its indexed request chain is not loaded yet. Refresh the catalogue or remount the item if you expected a save/apply chain.

derive.title: Request History ready
derive.detail: This screen shows the ordered request chain for the mounted item: staged request, handoff, handler, and response artifacts. It is an inspection screen, not a browsing screen.

guardrails: Request history presentation should summarize the index-driven chain in operator-facing language rather than exposing only raw preview output.
The chain remains descriptive and read-oriented.
Boards remain excluded because Boards never use terminal/saves/.
